title: Frontier Code (GPT-5.6 VS Mythos): This BENCHMARK is ACTUALLY REAL!
summary: Cognition released FrontierCode, a benchmark that measures whether AI-generated code is mergeable and production-ready by evaluating real pull request quality against maintainer-defined rubrics. It covers code from 36 open-source repositories across multiple programming languages and reports lower false positive rates than prior benchmarks like SWE-Bench Pro.
